description: Read the maintenance schedule document at ~/Desktop/maintenance_schedule.txt, then configure three distinct downtime/maintenance windows in ManageEngine OpManager. Navigate to Settings > Configuration > Downtime Scheduler (or Admin > Downtime Scheduler) to create the schedules. Ensure you create: 1) 'Core-Network-Weekend-Maintenance' (Weekly, Saturday, 02:00 AM - 06:00 AM), 2) 'Database-Cluster-Patch-Window' (Monthly, 1st Sunday or Day 1, 12:00 AM - 04:00 AM), 3) 'DR-Failover-Exercise-2025' (One-time, Dec 15 2025 10:00 PM - Dec 16 04:00 AM). Associate them with all devices or localhost. Application: http://localhost:8060 (credentials: admin / Admin@123).
